note: Gene-list accuracy is the objectively verifiable core. Each eval runs fetch_genes on a keyword and checks recall of a curated gold set of canonical genes. Summary prose is evaluated qualitatively, not here.

evals.prompt: ferroptosis 관련 gene 목록 뽑고 각 유전자 문헌 정리해줘
assertions: recall of gold genes in top-20 >= 0.5
no PMID cited in the final summary is absent from output/lit/<gene>.json
every gene row carries an access label (full-text / abstract-only)
recall of gold genes in top-20 >= 0.5

evals.prompt: autophagy 핵심 유전자 literature review 해줘
assertions: recall of gold genes in top-20 >= 0.4
generic hub genes (TP53/EGFR/APOE) do NOT dominate the top of the list
